resources.string: Advanced Full build

Full builds control Samsung bypass charging through Shizuku after one user grant. Root is not required. Normal Android Modify system settings access was tested on S24 Ultra and did not write Samsung pass_through.
Shizuku app control
Shizuku is the app-control backend for Samsung S24 Ultra. Charge Pilot cannot bundle, silently install, or silently start Shizuku, but after setup Home controls the setting from inside Charge Pilot.
Install/open Shizuku from the official source.
Enable Developer options and Wireless debugging.
Pair and start Shizuku from the Shizuku app.
Return to Charge Pilot and grant permission when prompted.
Use Home -> Turn on bypass charging. Reopen Shizuku after a reboot because the service usually stops.
Samsung fallback limitation
Samsung permission-gates hidden Game Booster settings pages from third-party apps. Charge Pilot controls the settings key directly when possible and keeps Gaming Hub only as a fallback.
Install / open Shizuku
Open Developer options
Official Shizuku guide
Advanced features in Play build

The Play build does not ship Shizuku or root modules. Samsung S24 Ultra app control needs the Full build because normal Android Modify system settings access did not write Samsung pass_through in testing.
Samsung fallback
Use Home -> Open fallback path, then in Gaming Hub open More -> Game Booster settings -> Pause USB PD charging when gaming.
Use a USB PD/PPS charger.
Keep battery above Samsung threshold, typically 20%.
Launch a game so Game Booster can apply the setting.
Need app control?
Install the Full build from a trusted non-Play release channel and set up Shizuku with Wireless debugging. Root is optional.
